description: Daily Deaths from Cholera and Diarrhaea in England, 1849
skip_reason: Time-series of daily aggregated death counts (Cholera vs Diarrhaea) with no individual-level binary outcome, no treatment/exposure variable, and no stratum variable. Each row is a day+cause combination with a count — purely ecological time-series data that cannot be aggregated into Successes/Cases per (Treatment × Stratum) cell.
